## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 sentences.

## Change Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Validation or tests
- [ ] Packaging or release hygiene
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Research behavior change

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or validation commands
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I did not add protected clinical data or local-only artifacts

## Notes for Reviewers

List any special review context, limitations, or follow-up work.
